1.Name: Vehicle Speed Upgrade MK1
1.Description: Increases vehicle movement speed by 1.5x. Multiple modules can be equipped.

2.Name: Vehicle Speed Upgrade MK2
2.Description: Increases vehicle movement speed by 2.0x. Multiple modules can be equipped.

3.Name: Vehicle Speed Upgrade MK3
3.Description: Increases vehicle movement speed by 2.5x. Multiple modules can be equipped.
